Interface Reference

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ConstructorReference, MemberReference, NameReference, TypeReferenceInfix
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnnotationPropertyReference, ArrayLengthReference, ArrayReference, Break, Continue, EnumConstructorReference, ExecCtxtSVWrapper, ExecutionContext, FieldReference, LabelJumpStatement, MetaClassReference, MethodReference, New, NewArray, NewArrayWrapper, NewWrapper, PackageReference, RKeYMetaConstructType, SpecialConstructorReference, SpecialReferenceWrapper, SuperConstructorReference, SuperReference, ThisConstructorReference, ThisReference, TypeReference, TypeSVWrapper, UncollatedReferenceQualifier, VariableReference
public interface Reference extends ProgramElement
References are uses of names, variables or members. They can have a name (such as TypeReferences) or be anonymous (such as ArrayReference).
